subcodes.title: Words spoken in 1913 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: When I was present at an important gathering in Alexandria, a certain patriot arose to voice his praise and support for his country. He recited a poem and then
subcodes.first_line_orig: وقتی در یکی از مجالس مهمّهٴ اسکندریّه بودم شخصی از وطن خواهان بستایش و حمایت وطن خود
subcodes.subjects: @nationalism; love of country, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge
